reader_promise: A rationalist protagonist using forensic deduction to separate supernatural truth from corrupted folklore, drawn into escalating investigations where evidence chains deliver earned payoffs, romantic tension operates as emotional anchor and misdirection, mysteries compound rather than fully resolve, sensory-first horror grounds supernatural threats in visceral bodily response, and genre pivots between investigation, romance, and visceral horror create tonal variety while maintaining forward momentum toward larger cosmological questions.

core_engine.mechanism_description: Protagonist employs forensic deduction, memory analysis, and statistical anomaly detection to investigate supernatural phenomena. Investigation structure follows: folklore prompt → physical evidence discovery → witness testimony → witness coordination → confrontation → resolution with ambiguous supernatural implications. Payoff delayed across multiple chapters through information withholding between characters and reluctant confession mechanics.
core_engine.genre_shift_triggers: Rationalist investigation framework provides scaffolding for deliberate tone shattering when supernatural threat manifests; comedy relief strategically placed before major revelations; emotional climax achieved through vulnerability before horror reintroduced; genre transition signaled through prose register change rather than explicit breaks.

reader_rewards: {'reward_type': 'intellectual', 'description': 'Evidence chain revelation delivering earned deductive payoffs; statistical anomaly patterns suggesting impossible supernatural selection; forensic observation establishing protagonist competence'}

{'reward_type': 'emotional', 'description': 'Romantic tension with unreliable subplot structures; emotional climax through vulnerability and terminal diagnosis motivation; relationship development through supernatural pressure'}

{'reward_type': 'mystery', 'description': 'Mystery deepening that compounds rather than resolves creating perpetual forward tension; identity revelation recontextualizing previous scenes; layered deception maintaining reader uncertainty about ally/enemy classification'}

{'reward_type': 'visceral', 'description': 'Sensory-first horror grounded in bodily response (cold, dread, tactile wrongness); supernatural manifestation through ordinary object defamiliarization; body horror through biological corruption'}

{'reward_type': 'atmospheric', 'description': 'Environmental anomaly discovery creating supernatural tension; legend corruption motif separating folklore from truth; atmospheric buildup through absence rather than presence'}

{'reward_type': 'thematic', 'description': 'Genre pivot creating cognitive dissonance and tonal variety; cosmological framework expansion addressing larger existential questions; protective haunting subversion revealing benevolent truth behind malevolent reputation'}
reusable_mechanisms: {'mechanism_id': 'reluctant_protagonist_induction', 'abstraction': 'Protagonist with rationalist framework drawn into supernatural involvement through social pressure from ally figure, establishing resistance before immersion'}
{'mechanism_id': 'cryptic_prophecy_hook', 'abstraction': 'Prophecy delivered through supernatural medium as cryptic partial message creating resolution/new mystery duality and forward hook'}
{'mechanism_id': 'failed_ritual_persistence', 'abstraction': 'Ritual failure creates ongoing threat rather than clean resolution; horror persists beyond ritual frame maintaining long-term stakes'}
{'mechanism_id': 'time_locked_urgency', 'abstraction': 'Time-locked commitment creates deadline urgency requiring character action by specific temporal marker'}

{'mechanism_id': 'legend_investigation_sequence', 'abstraction': 'Folklore prompts physical investigation at described location; protagonist separates distorted folk version from true events requiring direct examination'}

{'mechanism_id': 'reputation_subversion', 'abstraction': 'Character with established reputation (timid/helpful) reveals hidden competence/agenda under pressure, maximizing twist impact through misdirection'}

{'mechanism_id': 'evidence_chain_revelation', 'abstraction': 'Physical discovery followed by emotional/supernatural response creates two-part payoff; investigation sequences use compound evidence accumulation before deductive leap'}

{'mechanism_id': 'forensic_deduction_structure', 'abstraction': 'Investigation follows infiltration of restricted space → methodical search → record analysis → leading to logical deduction; physical evidence used to prove supernatural interference'}

{'mechanism_id': 'witness_coordination', 'abstraction': 'Complementary investigation pair with distinct roles: ally provides information gathering access, protagonist provides analytical interpretation; characters argue while revealing information simultaneously'}
{'mechanism_id': 'shared_recurring_dream', 'abstraction': 'Dream serves as curse exposition device delivered to multiple characters, externalizing psychological state and foreshadowing real events'}

{'mechanism_id': 'knowledge_inconsistency_reveal', 'abstraction': 'Character exposes antagonist through demonstrating impossible expertise unavailable to claimed identity, triggering identity revelation'}

{'mechanism_id': 'romance_misdirection_twist', 'abstraction': 'Intimate scenes build reader expectations that identity-twist subverts; romantic investment recontextualized as manipulation trap; love interest doubles as primary threat'}
{'mechanism_id': 'protective_haunting_subversion', 'abstraction': "Ghost's malevolent reputation turns out to mask self-sacrificing protection; apparent threat conceals benevolent intent"}

{'mechanism_id': 'closed_room_murder_investigation', 'abstraction': 'Non-professional investigator recruited through skill gap; missing weapon/evidence creates impossible crime demanding supernatural explanation'}

{'mechanism_id': 'statistical_anomaly_discovery', 'abstraction': 'Impossible patterns in data suggest supernatural selection rather than random distribution; numerical evidence forces rationalist acceptance'}

{'mechanism_id': 'group_coerced_investigation', 'abstraction': 'Investigation team formed through coercion and shared evidence discovery; divided party mechanics create interpersonal tension alongside mystery'}

{'mechanism_id': 'supernatural_manifestation_ordinary_object', 'abstraction': 'Supernatural entity or threat introduced through ordinary object defamiliarization (apple, mirror, clock, cat); mundane item becomes focal horror element'}

{'mechanism_id': 'environmental_sensory_disruption', 'abstraction': 'Cold, dread, wrong sounds precede supernatural entity introduction; sensory anomaly accumulation before explicit threat statement'}

{'mechanism_id': 'layered_deception_nested', 'abstraction': 'Multiple characters lie for unclear reasons creating inconsistent testimony requiring investigation; both parties know they are being used but proceed'}

{'mechanism_id': 'terminal_ticking_clock', 'abstraction': 'Specific countdown (7-day diagnosis) transforms death sentence into active mission framework; emotional stakes coexist with investigation urgency'}

{'mechanism_id': 'dual_narrative_historical_modern', 'abstraction': 'Present investigation alternating with historical romance mirror; modern characters paralleling historical figures adding personal stakes to academic mystery'}

{'mechanism_id': 'genre_pivot_mid_chapter', 'abstraction': 'Investigation rationalism maintained until deliberate tone shatter; horror introduced during emotional vulnerability peak creating maximum impact'}

{'mechanism_id': 'double_agent_reversal', 'abstraction': 'Apparent ally revealed as working with mastermind; betrayal creates trap-within-discovery where successful investigation leads directly into prepared ambush'}

{'mechanism_id': 'confession_weapon_backstory', 'abstraction': 'Character recounts entire history through dialogue under interrogation pressure; antagonist delivers exposition through lecturing tone establishing power dynamics'}

{'mechanism_id': 'memory_tampering_deduction', 'abstraction': 'Physical evidence used to prove supernatural interference with human recollection; protagonist recognizes inconsistency between evidence and claimed memory'}

{'mechanism_id': 'geographic_reset_continuity', 'abstraction': 'Primary mystery resolved, antagonist dead, new supernatural theory proposed; protagonist relocates geographically creating narrative reset while maintaining character continuity'}

{'mechanism_id': 'supernatural_weather_transition', 'abstraction': 'Environmental anomaly (anomalous rain, wrong moon phase) serves as story-mode transition signal; ordinary conditions shift to supernatural indicator'}

{'mechanism_id': 'mirror_supernatural_conduit', 'abstraction': 'Reflective surface distorts reality, allows entity interaction, creates visual absence (headless reflection); supernatural threshold crossing through reflective surface'}

{'mechanism_id': 'anthropological_artifact_connection', 'abstraction': 'Multiple seemingly unrelated artifacts pointing to same historical figure; physical evidence chain linking modern anomalies to historical secrets through forensic analysis'}

{'mechanism_id': 'emotional_grief_weaponized_climax', 'abstraction': 'Emotional breakdown serves as narrative climax after action tension resolves; grief replaces physical confrontation as story peak'}
non_reusable_specifics: Protagonist personal name and character designation system
Female ally character names and relationship designations
Antagonist family names and organizational affiliations
Specific Chinese geographic locations and urban settings
Chinese cultural terminology requiring cultural context (feng shui concepts, tea ceremony specifics, Chinese funeral practices)
Specific horror details involving body modification, execution methods, anatomical descriptions
Chinese internet novel specific curse words, informal expressions, and verbal tics
Philosophical essay openings using cultural quotations as thematic framing
Specific crime scene procedural details dependent on jurisdiction
Real historical figure specific biographical details and cultural artifacts (tea saint mythology)
Specific supernatural rule mechanics requiring technical explanation (curse mechanisms, ritual components)
risk_patterns: {'risk_id': 'exposition_overload_opening', 'description': 'Extensive pre-plot exposition in opening chapter creates pacing issues and risks reader attrition; backstory structure front-loaded before primary narrative begins', 'mitigation': 'Restructure to deliver backstory through discovered plot rather than front-loaded summary; begin with hook incident before world-building'}

{'risk_id': 'genre_transition_whiplash', 'description': 'Abrupt tonal transition from expository resolution to visceral horror may alienate readers; comedic relief scenes creating tonal whiplash disrupting horror atmosphere', 'mitigation': 'Signal genre transitions through prose register change; use environmental shifts as transition scaffolding; maintain minimum scene length before tone shift'}

{'risk_id': 'narrator_unreliability_trust_erosion', 'description': 'Protagonist admits to manipulating evidence and destroying physical proof, undermining reader trust; extensive unreliable narrator effect may create reader distrust of investigation conclusions', 'mitigation': 'Establish protagonist competence before introducing moral ambiguity; separate unreliable narration (personal bias) from evidence reliability'}

{'risk_id': 'mystery_accumulation_frustration', 'description': 'Multiple mystery layers introduced in single chapter may dilute focus; mysteries accumulate faster than resolution creating reader frustration across chapters', 'mitigation': 'Balance mystery introduction with resolution delivery (2-3 mysteries resolved per major arc); ensure each new mystery feels connected to existing threads rather than parallel distraction'}

{'risk_id': 'protagonist_hubris_alienation', 'description': "Protagonist intellectual defense mechanism and manipulative dialogue could alienate readers expecting sympathetic protagonist; protagonist's irrational chase behavior may frustrate", 'mitigation': "Balance intellectual hubris with visible vulnerability moments; ensure protagonist's manipulation serves plot purpose rather than pure character establishment"}

{'risk_id': 'death_count_emotional_diminishment', 'description': 'Multiple character deaths in compressed timeframe diminishing emotional impact per death; high emotional intensity scenes without recovery periods exhausting reader investment', 'mitigation': 'Space major deaths across arcs with recovery periods; differentiate death stakes through personal connection rather than quantity'}

{'risk_id': 'information_withholding_reader_frustration', 'description': 'Systematic rules established may make future supernatural threats feel predictable; conversely, insufficient rule establishment creates plot convenience accusations', 'mitigation': 'Establish core supernatural mechanics early while keeping cosmology open-ended; resolve information gaps through character urgency rather than authorial withholding'}

{'risk_id': 'ensemble_dilution', 'description': 'Large character ensemble creating protagonist centrality dilution and tracking burden; character names and relationship labels requiring reader memorization', 'mitigation': 'Limit active ensemble to 5-7 characters per arc; differentiate through speech pattern and function rather than nomenclature complexity'}

{'risk_id': 'cliffhanger_dependency', 'description': 'Chapter endings over-relying on unanswered questions and escalating threats creating resolution fatigue and trust erosion if promises not delivered', 'mitigation': 'Deliver on hooks within 2-3 chapters maximum; vary hook types (plot, relational, atmospheric) rather than constant threat escalation'}

{'risk_id': 'retroactive_reinterpretation_fatigue', 'description': 'Third-act reveals of character identity or death status retroactively reinterpret previous scenes; successive antagonist reveals may exhaust reader capacity for trust evaluation', 'mitigation': 'Limit major identity reveals to one per arc; ensure earlier reveals are emotionally earned rather than mechanical plot devices'}

{'risk_id': 'romance_reliance_narrowing', 'description': 'Heavy reliance on romantic subplot may alienate readers expecting pure mystery; multiple romantic complications (love triangle, fake relationship) may fragment focus', 'mitigation': 'Ensure mystery investigation drives primary plot regardless of romantic status; use romance as tension mechanism rather than central narrative structure'}

{'risk_id': 'antagonist_monologue_pacing', 'description': 'Extended antagonist confession sequences risk reader abandonment; villain perspective interiority may feel like delay rather than character development', 'mitigation': 'Break confession sequences with protagonist reaction/interruption; tie backstory delivery to present-day stakes rather than pure history lesson'}
